problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating may resolve What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
